listing_facts.model_or_name: 'Speed Racer' V-neck short-sleeve knit polo sweater (cream/black, embroidered crest + script logo)
listing_facts.size: Tag appears to read S — not explicitly stated in the listing text
photo_observations: Cream/oatmeal short-sleeve V-neck knit with black ribbed collar and black contrast shoulder panels
Embroidered gold/blue crest on chest, 'Speed Racer' text top-left, cursive 'Aelfric Eden' script across chest
Blue woven brand tag at neck reads 'AELFRIC EDEN' with a size letter
Only the front is shown in the main photo; carousel shows 5 images total
Free shipping; item shows a 'Sold' state with a 'Show interest' prompt

price_read.reasoning: Aelfric Eden knit polo/V-neck sweaters typically retail around $60-80 new on the brand site and Amazon. On the resale side (Poshmark, ThredUp, eBay), used Aelfric Eden sweaters commonly land in the ~$27-40 range. At $28 with free shipping for a 'Like new' piece, this sits at the low end of used comps and is a clear discount vs new — so the price is fair-to-good, not a rip-off. Numbers are approximate ranges from comparable listings, not an exact match for this specific style. Note the screenshot shows a 'Sold' indicator, so it may already be gone.

missing_info: No measurements anywhere (pit-to-pit, length, shoulder) — fit is a total guess, especially since Aelfric Eden runs oversized
Size not stated in the title/description; only faintly visible on the neck tag
Main image only shows the front — no back, no tag close-up, no fabric/condition detail in view
'Like new' is vague with no close-ups to confirm pilling, stains, or stretched cuffs
concerns: Brand often sells in an oversized fit, so without measurements the actual wearable size is unclear
'Sold' status in the screenshot — confirm it's still available before getting attached
questions_to_ask: Can you share pit-to-pit, total length, and shoulder measurements laid flat?
What size is on the tag, and would you say it fits true to size or oversized?
Can you post clear photos of the back, the neck/brand tag, and any close-up of the knit?
Any flags — pilling, snags, stretched cuffs, or marks I should know about?

red_flags: 'Speed Racer' embroidery — Aelfric Eden's actual graphic on these is usually 'Speed Racing', so the wording is worth double-checking against official product photos
Aelfric Eden is widely dupe'd/relisted, and at the budget price tier mislabeled or lookalike knits do circulate
No close-up of the neck tag or any inner labels to compare stitching and font
what_to_inspect: Neck tag: woven 'AELFRIC EDEN' font, color, and stitch quality vs the brand's official tags
Embroidery quality — clean, dense stitching on the crest and script vs loose/fuzzy threads
Compare the exact graphic text and crest to the same style on aelfriceden.com or Amazon
Inner care/composition label and any logo placement consistency

verdict.one_line: Fair price and a legit discount vs retail — just nail down measurements and a tag close-up before you commit, since there's zero fit info and a couple small detail mismatches to verify.
verdict.user_context: browsing, want to know if this is fair and legit before I offer
